recipe.title: Easy carbonara
recipe.description: This easy pasta sauce will cook in about the same time it takes to cook some dried pasta in boiling salted water – super quick and tasty.

ingredients.name: rashers of higher-welfare smoked streaky bacon

steps.descr: Cook the pasta in a pan of boiling salted water...
steps.instructions: Cook the pasta in a pan of boiling salted water according to the packet instructions.

on_enter.say: Cook the pasta in a pan of boiling salted water according to the packet instructions.

steps.descr: Slice the bacon and place in a non-stick frying pan on a...
steps.instructions: Slice the bacon and place in a non-stick frying pan on a medium heat with half a tablespoon of olive oil and a really good pinch of black pepper. Leave it to get super-golden and crispy, tossing occasionally, then turn off the heat.

on_enter.say: Slice the bacon and place in a non-stick frying pan on a medium heat with half a tablespoon of olive oil and a really good pinch of black pepper. Leave it to get super-golden and crispy, tossing occasionally, then turn off the heat.

steps.descr: Meanwhile, beat the eggs in a bowl, then finely grate in...
steps.instructions: Meanwhile, beat the eggs in a bowl, then finely grate in the Parmesan and mix well.

on_enter.say: Meanwhile, beat the eggs in a bowl, then finely grate in the Parmesan and mix well.

steps.descr: Use tongs to transfer your pasta straight into the pan...
steps.instructions: Use tongs to transfer your pasta straight into the pan and toss with the bacon.

on_enter.say: Use tongs to transfer your pasta straight into the pan and toss with the bacon.

steps.descr: Pour the Parmesan eggs into the pan, and keep everything...
steps.instructions: Pour the Parmesan eggs into the pan, and keep everything moving, loosening with splashes of the pasta cooking water until you have a silky sauce. Make sure the pan isn’t too hot otherwise the eggs will scramble.

on_enter.say: Pour the Parmesan eggs into the pan, and keep everything moving, loosening with splashes of the pasta cooking water until you have a silky sauce. Make sure the pan isn’t too hot otherwise the eggs will scramble.

steps.descr: Plate up the pasta, and finish with an extra grating of...
steps.instructions: Plate up the pasta, and finish with an extra grating of Parmesan.

on_enter.say: Plate up the pasta, and finish with an extra grating of Parmesan.
